summary: Iteration 10 - Complete testing of 6 NEW zone categories and Rectangle drag-to-draw tool. Backend: 10/10 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All features verified working - 4 mode toolbar buttons (Pan/Draw/Rect/Edit), all 16 zone types in dropdowns, Feb 17 sample session with 3 zones, zone cards display correct names/colors.

backend: GET /api/map-sessions?floor_id=... - Feb 17 session exists with 3 zones
POST /api/admin/map-sessions/{id}/zones - Create zone with men_rakatayn type
POST /api/admin/map-sessions/{id}/zones - Create zone with emergency type
POST /api/admin/map-sessions/{id}/zones - Create zone with vip type
PUT /api/admin/map-sessions/{id}/zones/{zone_id} - Update to women_rakatayn triggers category_changed
POST /api/admin/zones - Create master zone with men_tasks type
All 16 zone types accepted by session zone API (enum validation)
Zone type enum includes: men_rakatayn, women_rakatayn, men_tasks, women_tasks, emergency, vip
frontend: Mode toolbar shows 4 buttons: Pan, Draw, Rectangle (NEW), Edit
Rectangle mode button has Square icon (data-testid='mode-rect-btn')
Rectangle mode instruction visible: 'انقر واسحب لرسم مستطيل. حرر الماوس لإنهاء الشكل'
Feb 17 session loads with 3 zones on map (green/blue areas)
Zones tab shows 3 zone cards with correct icons: M (green), W (blue), R (dark green)
Zone card 3-0-1 displays 'مصلى الركعتين للرجال' (men_rakatayn - NEW type)
New zone dialog shows all 16 zone types in dropdown
NEW zone types in dropdown: مصلى الركعتين للرجال, مصلى الركعتين للنساء, مصلى مهمات رجال, مصلى مهمات نساء, مجمعات خدمات الطوارئ, مصلى رؤساء الدول
Map Management page (/map-management) also has all 16 zone types synced
Edit mode shows instruction: 'انقر على منطقة لتحديدها، اسحب النقاط لتعديلها'
Zoom controls work: Zoom In, Zoom Out, Reset
Shape buttons (circle/rect/triangle) work in draw mode

seed_data_creation: Feb 17 session with ID '0a5aa22d-eb43-4967-8ca2-d08ad7077454' on floor '773f281e-ff1d-4983-b92b-6a50412dd547' contains 3 sample zones: 1-0-1 (men_prayer), 2-0-1 (women_prayer), 3-0-1 (men_rakatayn)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 tested: 1) 6 NEW zone categories added to ZONE_TYPES: men_rakatayn, women_rakatayn, men_tasks, women_tasks, emergency, vip. 2) Rectangle drag-to-draw mode (mapMode='rect') added to toolbar - user can click and drag on map to instantly create a rectangle zone. 3) ZONE_TYPES are synced between DailySessionsPage.jsx and MapManagementPage.jsx (both have 16 types). 4) Feb 17 session has 3 sample zones including one with the new men_rakatayn type. 5) All previous features continue to work (Pan, Draw, Edit modes, zoom controls, calendar, session list).

new_zone_types.details: All 6 new zone types (men_rakatayn, women_rakatayn, men_tasks, women_tasks, emergency, vip) visible in dropdown and accepted by backend

rectangle_mode_button.details: Rectangle mode button visible in toolbar with Square icon (data-testid='mode-rect-btn')

rectangle_mode_instruction.details: Arabic instruction 'انقر واسحب لرسم مستطيل' displayed when rect mode active

zone_cards_display.details: Zone cards show correct category names and colors including new types

map_management_sync.details: MapManagementPage has same 16 zone types as DailySessionsPage

existing_features_regression.details: Pan/Draw/Edit modes, zoom controls, shape generators all working
